narrative:
Huron County has 35,404 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.9 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.1% of registrants.
